zh.lifeSummary: 當Enguerrand de Fiennes於1192年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾文多福時，他的父親Lord William de Fiennes33歲，母親Agnès de DAMMARTIN16歲。他於1240年與Agnès de Condé de Morialmes結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1265年9月在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾文多福享年73歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Enguerrand de Fiennes于1192年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾文多福时，他的父亲Lord William de Fiennes33岁，母亲Agnès de DAMMARTIN16岁。他于1240年与Agnès de Condé de Morialmes结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1265年9月在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾文多福享年73岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Enguerrand de Fiennes was born in 1192, in Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Lord William de Fiennes, was 33 and his mother, Agnès de DAMMARTIN, was 16. He married Agnès de Condé de Morialmes in 1240. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died in September 1265, in Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Enguerrand de Fiennes est né en 1192, à Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord William de Fiennes, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnès de DAMMARTIN, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de Condé de Morialmes en 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en septembre 1265, à Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Enguerrand de Fiennes 1192 in Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord William de Fiennes 33 und seine Mutter Agnès de DAMMARTIN 16. Er hat 1240 Agnès de Condé de Morialmes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb im September 1265 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Enguerrand de Fiennes è nato il nel 1192 nel Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Lord William de Fiennes, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de DAMMARTIN, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de Condé de Morialmes nel 1240. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1265, nel Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Enguerrand de Fiennesが1192年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエンドバーで生まれた時，父Lord William de Fiennesは33歳，母Agnès de DAMMARTINは16歳であった。1240年にAgnès de Condé de Morialmesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1265年9月にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエンドバーで73歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Enguerrand de Fiennes(이)가 1192년 영국 벅잉함실르 웬도버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord William de Fiennes(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de DAMMARTIN(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1240년 Agnès de Condé de Morialmes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1265년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 웬도버에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Of, Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England: Wendover, Buccingahamscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England: Wendover, Buccingahamscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Enguerrand de Fiennes nasceu em 1192, em Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord William de Fiennes, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de DAMMARTIN, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de Condé de Morialmes em 1240. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1265, em Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Enguerrand de Fiennes родился в 1192 г. в местности вендовир, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord William de Fiennes было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnès de DAMMARTIN, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de Condé de Morialmes в 1240 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер сентябрь 1265 г. в местности вендовир, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Enguerrand de Fiennes nació en 1192, en Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord William de Fiennes, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Agnès de DAMMARTIN, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Agnès de Condé de Morialmes en 1240. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1265, en Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
